# CLI11

Vendored copy of CLI11 used by the pqueue command-line tools.

## Source

Downloaded from the upstream CLI11 release:

https://github.com/CLIUtils/CLI11/releases/download/v2.6.2/CLI11.hpp

Version: `v2.6.2`

## License

CLI11 is distributed under the 3-Clause BSD license. See the upstream
repository for the full license text:

https://github.com/CLIUtils/CLI11

## Notes

This project vendors the single-header release file only.

Do not modify `CLI11.hpp` locally. To update it, replace it with a newer
single-header release from upstream and update this README with the new version
and source URL.
